description: First-pass classifier: flat 29-class label set (27 animal + blank + setup_pickup); split by camera (location==folder, 1:1). This file records the train/val camera assignment and how the 256 source categories were mapped/merged/excluded.

parameters.split_method: class-aware ILP by camera, minimize per-class relative deviation from val_fraction
parameters.image_resize: whole frame, short side ~512px, JPEG q90

sources.source_category: woodrat or rat or mouse species

sources.reason: turtle (testudines); too few, not a target class
turtle (testudines); too few, not a target class
